mapper.select: SELECT C.CMT_ID, C.POST_ID, C.MBR_ID, M.NM AS MBR_NM, C.CONTENT, C.REG_DTTM, C.REG_USER, C.REG_IP, C.UPD_DTTM, C.UPD_USER, C.UPD_IP, C.DEL_YN, C.USE_YN FROM TB_CMT C LEFT JOIN TB_MBR M ON M.MBR_ID = C.MBR_ID WHERE C.POST_ID = #{postId} AND C.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY C.REG_DTTM ASC

SELECT C.CMT_ID, C.POST_ID, C.MBR_ID, M.NM AS MBR_NM, C.CONTENT, C.REG_DTTM, C.REG_USER, C.REG_IP, C.UPD_DTTM, C.UPD_USER, C.UPD_IP, C.DEL_YN, C.USE_YN FROM TB_CMT C LEFT JOIN TB_MBR M ON M.MBR_ID = C.MBR_ID WHERE C.CMT_ID = #{cmtId} AND C.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CMT ( CMT_ID, POST_ID, MBR_ID, CONTENT, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP, DEL_YN, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{cmtId}, #{postId}, #{mbrId}, #{content}, #{regDttm}, #{regUser}, #{regIp}, #{updDttm}, #{updUser}, #{updIp}, 'N', 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_CMT SET CONTENT = #{content}, UPD_DTTM = #{updDttm}, UPD_USER = #{updUser}, UPD_IP = #{updIp} WHERE CMT_ID = #{cmtId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
